load_mcp_config: load MCP server configuration from project, user, or env var path with automatic API key resolution
save_mcp_config: save an MCPServersFile config object to a JSON file at the given path
add_server_to_config: add a new MCP server entry to the project config file and persist it to disk
create_default_mcp_config: create a default mcp_servers.json config file with a litellm example server in the project directory
resolve_env_vars_in_headers: resolve Bearer MCP_SERVER_API_KEY placeholders in server headers by replacing them with actual environment variable values
